title: athyrium lilloi
intro: Athyrium lilloi, also known as Lillo's Lady Fern, is a species of fern native to South America. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Athyrium lilloi include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Athyrium lilloi can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and it is also used in tincture form to extract its medicinal properties.
